main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'sílice scaling stage 2 + undersized antiscalant for elevated recovery 82%' literal.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (sílice coloidal, MECH defect, biofouling, CaCO3).

recommended_action.justification: Aumentar antiscalant 8→12 ppm + aumentar pH 7.1→7.8-8.0 con NaOH — match gold ACT 2 y ACT 3 (subir pH para solubilidad sílice).

requested_data.justification: Pide sílice en concentrate etapa 2 — match accepted (sílice rechazo).

decision_change_condition.justification: Single threshold: si stage 2 reject silica <200 mg/L → switch.
